content.title: Cap upward auto-promotion at in-progress
content.description:
Spec: .agentic/specs/cap-upward-promotion-spec.md

When all children of a parent reach 'done', the parent is currently auto-promoted to 'done'. This prevents the managing agent from creating more children. Cap upward auto-promotion at 'in-progress' so parents never auto-promote to done/closed.

content.content: Progress update: Quality review (mp9xemy1j3) DONE with excellent feedback on reason strings, multi-level semantics, and test coverage. All concerns addressed in spec update. Spec updated to REVIEWED status with clarifications section. No blockers on my end.
